title: OPPO Ace2 x EVA smartphone Commercial
display_title: OPPO Ace2 x EVA smartphone Commercial
wikitext:
[]: OPPO Ace2 x EVA smartphone Commercial             Quote Post by Luminous » Fri May 29, 2020 6:01 am Interesting Chinese commercial for the new EVA-branded smartphone, using 3D-rendered/live action cinematics. Is this footage new, or from some scrapped past project? It sure is impressive. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: OPPO Ace2 x EVA smartphone Commercial             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat May 30, 2020 9:04 pm This is definitely the first time I'm seeing this, as far as I know this is new However, it also isn't in a way. It's for the most part just a mashup of one of the 1.0 trailers in the style of the Another Impact short, and then what looks like unused Another Impact scenes with Unit Null replaced by 01. Either way, looks hellishly cool, looking forward to whatever is to come out of this

[]: Re: OPPO Ace2 x EVA smartphone Commercial             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Jun 01, 2020 9:03 am Found a link to an unboxing of the actual phone It looks pretty I guess, and the UI is kinda neat, but unlike the last one with the full Nerv-themed interface, the collab seems to be only on the surface this time around

Either way, looks hellishly cool, looking forward to whatever is to come out of this
